q:
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series?
103 119 135 151 167 ?

If the signs '+' and '-' are interchanged with each other and '*' and '/' are interchanged with each other, then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation?
44 + 6 / 195 * 3 - 473 = ?

Three letter-clusters have been given on the basis of certain operations on the alphabetical sequence. Which one of the four letter-clusters does not follow the same pattern and is therefore not related to the others? (Note: The operations are to be performed on the letter-clusters, not on the count of letters in them.)

Six people A, B, C, D, E, F are sitting in a row facing north. Q is sitting second from the left end. There are exactly three people between Q and A. There are exactly two people between C and E. C is not adjacent to A. E is at one of the ends. Who is sitting at the extreme right end?
In a certain code language, 'let you know' is written as 'nj rc bn', and 'know the people' is written as 'kn kp rc'. How is 'know' written in that language?

What should come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series?
DRT UIK LZB CQS ?

Krishna initially starts walking from point A and walks 46 km towards the east. Then she turns right and walks 54 km. Then she turns right again and walks 56 km. Then she turns right again and walks 63 km. Finally she turns left and walks 10 km. In which direction is she now with respect to point A? (Assume she took only 90-degree turns.)

Choose the option that follows the same pattern as that of the given pair of words placed below.
ME-KC-IL
PH-NF-LO

What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the given series?
29 35 42 50 59 69 ?

A boy and his 40 classmates are standing in a row all facing the same direction. If the boy is at the 5th position from the left end and at the 22nd position from the right end, then how many people are standing between the boy and the right end?

Seven boxes B, D, E, P, S, T and W are kept one above the other, but not necessarily in the same order. Only one box is kept above B. Two boxes are kept between B and S. T is kept just above E. Which box is kept just above S?

This question is based on the three-digit numbers given below.
783 791 531 563 594
Instructions: (697 - first digit = 6, second digit = 9 and third digit = 7?)
Note: All digits are to be read from left to right. If the smallest digit of each number is added to the second-largest digit of that number, then what will be the result?

Tony starts walking towards the north and walks 30 meters. Then he turns right and walks 10 meters. Then he turns right again and walks 30 meters to reach his school. In which direction is his school located from his starting point? (Assume he took only 90-degree turns.)

This question is based on the three-digit numbers given below.
453 125 410 183 473
Instructions: (697 - first digit = 6, second digit = 9 and third digit = 7?)
Note: All digits are to be read from left to right. If the third digit of the largest number is added to the third digit of the smallest number, then what will be the result?

If 'A' means '+', '-' means '*', 'C' means '/' and 'D' means '-', then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation?
70 B 4 D (50 A 5) B 11 C (24 A 2) B 4 C 10 = ?

Answer the following question by arranging the given numbers according to the instructions given below. Counting is to be done only from the right. All numbers are to be read as a single number.
4 3 7 1 3 5 9 4 6 2 1 7 4 2 9 7 6 7 9 5 1 3 8 4 2 5
How many even numbers are there such that each is immediately preceded by an even number and also immediately followed by an even number?
In a certain code language, 'stop disturbing people' is written as 'ls ck rp', and 'people need peace' is written as 'cd dk rp'. How is 'people' written in that language?
Which film won the Best Direction award for the 71st National Film Awards 2025 (for films released in 2023)?
o: Karam Joar - Riti aur Rangi ki Prem Kahani

q: In May 2025, which specific situation did the Reserve Bank of India order all banks to fully repay early?
o: Loans defaulted by senior citizens or those over 70 years old
Only credit card balances of students

q: In which Lok Sabha did the opposition give a motion to remove a sitting Allahabad High Court judge for the first time in 30 years, after his alleged remarks, and which provision was used?
o: Constitution (One Hundred and Thirtieth Amendment) Bill, 2025
Constitution (One Hundred and Twenty-Ninth Amendment) Bill, 2025
Constitution (One Hundred and Forty-Eighth Amendment) Bill, 2025
Constitution (One Hundred and Twenty-Eighth Amendment) Bill, 2025

q: In which of the following states of Madhya Pradesh is the Kuno National Park located?
Which project of the Ministry of Panchayati Raj was selected for the e-Governance 2025 National Award for using such technology to help citizens?
Where was the India Open Badminton Super 750 tournament held in January 2025?
In which of the following cities is the 'Food Conscience: Campus for Resilient Future' located?
Who was appointed as the new Chairman of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) in February 2025, who will handle the affairs going forward?
As of June 2025, how many countries had ratified the French High Seas Treaty, against the required number for it to come into force?
Which Australian athlete set a new Australian national record of 200 m with a time of 20.02 seconds at the Golden Spike Meet in 2025?
The Environment Audit Rules, 2025 are in line with which national reform agenda of India?
Which of the following is the parent Act that was replaced by the Indian Ports Bill, 2025, passed by the Rajya Sabha on 18 August 2025?
Who is the author of the memoir 'Mother Mary Comes to Me', set to release in September 2025?
According to SBI's January 2025 report, what was India's rural poverty rate in the financial year 24?
Which of the following marks the day on which the new GST rates come into effect, signifying the foundation of the new GST regime?
Under which of the following projects will the CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology (IGIB) establish a National Bioassay in New Delhi?
In May 2025, in which district of Bihar did Chief Minister Nitish Kumar inaugurate a new textile centre at a university?
Who was appointed as the head of the three-member committee constituted in June 2025 to assess the damage caused by the disaster in Uttarakhand?
o: Uttarakhand's Inspector General, Pushkar Singh Dhami
CEO of the Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services

q: In June 2025, which Indian state withdrew the three-language policy for schools and constituted a committee under educationist Narendra Jadhav to suggest the way forward?
Which male athlete set new world indoor records on 13 February 2025 in both the 1500 m (3:29.63 en route) and the mile (3:45.14)?
